prompt: Refactor reporter.py to remove duplicated title/subtitle normalization logic without changing behavior or function names. Keep it small, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: Duplication between render_title() and render_subtitle() is reduced
The public behavior and function names stay unchanged
pytest -q is run successfully after the refactor
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Add unrelated features or docs updates
